dataset_name: FastAPI official documentation independent evaluation set
corpus_description: The corpus contains nine public FastAPI tutorial pages downloaded from the official fastapi/fastapi repository on 2026-07-14. It is separate from this project's documentation and demonstration corpus.
question_authoring: This Chinese question-and-label dataset was AI-assisted after fixing the source corpus and was not generated from the retrieval system. An independent human reviewer subsequently checked every question, reference answer, and source mapping; the review sheet preserves the declared verdicts and evidence notes.
source_labeling: Expected filenames were checked against the official source pages by an independent human reviewer before the formal retrieval run. Labels identify acceptable source documents, not a model-generated answer.
